semantic_contract.job_to_be_done: Help an early-stage VC operator structure local project materials into evidence-first diligence artifacts without replacing investment judgment.
should_trigger: User asks for jvc-prefixed diligence skills
User asks to structure project decks, interviews, market sizing, comps, return models, IC memo drafts, or invoice archives using this toolkit
should_not_trigger: Pure teaching or explanation requests with no reusable output artifact
Uploading private deal materials to third-party web tools
General accounting workflows outside jvc-invoice-manager boundaries
semantic_contract.trust_boundary: Local-first repository. Raw deal materials stay local; shipped scripts may read/write local files but do not include network-capable code.

skills.name: jvc-prescreen
skills.job: Turn a deck or early project material into a structured first-pass screen.

skills.name: jvc-bull-case
skills.job: Extract positive investment arguments with evidence and verification gaps.
failure_modes: Mixes unsupported intuition into verified highlights

skills.name: jvc-bear-case
skills.job: Run role-based adversarial review from LP, competitor CEO, skeptical peer, and IC boss perspectives.

skills.name: jvc-track-research
skills.job: Build a sector map with definitions, history, technical routes, value chain, trends, players, policy, and investment questions.
failure_modes: Milestones and commercialization claims are mixed

skills.name: jvc-knowledge-tree-builder
skills.job: Convert existing local VC track, project, Obsidian, or source folders into recursive knowledge tree artifacts with evidence and open questions.
failure_modes: Mixes investment conclusion with knowledge structure

skills.name: jvc-comps-dd
skills.job: Research competitors and comparable companies into a structured Excel workbook.
failure_modes: Public market cap and private financing valuation mixed as one metric

skills.name: jvc-market-sizing
skills.job: Build top-down and bottom-up TAM/SAM/SOM models with reconciliation and orthogonality checks.

skills.name: jvc-roi-modeler
skills.job: Model investment terms, financing dilution, exit scenarios, MOIC/IRR, and sensitivity.

skills.name: jvc-ic-memo
skills.job: Synthesize prior diligence materials into a ten-section IC memo draft.
failure_modes: Risk section shorter than investment logic

skills.name: jvc-meeting-notes
skills.job: Generate a six-section factual DOCX interview note from transcript and user notes.

skills.name: jvc-talk-notes
skills.job: Generate Q&A-style DOCX interview notes with complete answers, fact dimensions, and validation gaps.
failure_modes: Puts Q headings in body content

skills.name: jvc-invoice-manager
skills.job: OCR PDF invoices, require human confirmation, generate reimbursement Excel, and copy PDFs into archive folders.
failure_modes: Uses unreviewed OCR as final truth
Leaks invoice data into investment judgment

evals.evidence_level: deterministic fixture evidence; model-executed evidence is missing evidence
